name: Stage & Song
description: Musical stories about performers, collaboration, ambition, and life around the stage.

name: Sports & Competition
description: Athletic stories about training, rivalry, teamwork, pressure, defeat, and triumph.

name: Unreliable Intimacy
description: A close, subjective voice whose account cannot be accepted at face value.

name: Chorus of Voices
description: An ensemble story built from contrasting viewpoints and partial truths.

name: Rivals & Reluctant Allies
description: Competitive or hostile characters forced into cooperation.

name: Chosen Bonds
description: Deep nontraditional bonds that become family, partnership, or home.

name: Keepers of Knowledge
description: Characters whose work preserves, interprets, maps, or uncovers knowledge.

name: Working Hands
description: Tradespeople, laborers, and makers whose practical work shapes the story.

name: Disabled & Adaptive Lives
description: Disabled characters living full lives shaped by access, adaptation, community, and identity.

name: Across Generations
description: Lives connected across age, inheritance, memory, care, and family history.

name: Remote Outposts
description: Small isolated communities at the edge of wilderness, knowledge, or survival.

name: Roads, Rivers & Rails
description: Stories shaped by movement, transit, chance meetings, and the route itself.

name: Rule & Resistance
description: Systems of rule confronted by dissent, reform, revolution, and competing legitimacy.

name: Community Economies
description: Work, ownership, exchange, and survival organized at a human scale.

name: Living Magic
description: Magic that behaves like ecology, inheritance, weather, illness, or a living presence.

name: Forbidden Arts
description: Taboo and criminalized magic pursued for power, survival, knowledge, or love.

name: Posthuman Futures
description: Bodies, minds, and identities transformed by biotechnology and computation.

name: Deep-Space Working Lives
description: Ordinary labor, trade, salvage, and survival across an extraordinary frontier.

name: Hidden Inheritance
description: A legacy conceals identity, danger, disputed ownership, or a buried obligation.

name: Institutional Conspiracy
description: A powerful organization protects wrongdoing through secrecy, influence, and coercion.

name: Stranded Together
description: Characters must survive isolation while dependency intensifies their relationships.

name: Disaster & Rescue
description: Communities and responders confront cascading danger under severe time pressure.

name: Rise & Fall
description: Ambition brings power, compromise, exposure, and the possibility of ruin.

name: Second Chances
description: Characters return, recover, repair harm, and decide who they will become next.

name: Fractured Chronology
description: A story assembled across disrupted time, repetition, memory, and parallel strands.

name: Documents & Testimony
description: A story constructed from records, correspondence, media, and competing accounts.

name: Warm & Tender
description: Emotionally safe, affectionate stories attentive to care and small acts of kindness.

name: Eerie & Ominous
description: Quiet wrongness, gathering dread, and an atmosphere that promises danger.

name: Intimate & Quiet
description: Small-scale stories driven by observation, relationship, and subtle internal change.

name: Operatic & Sweeping
description: Grand-scale stories of heightened emotion, spectacle, consequence, and history.

name: Lyrical & Lush
description: Language-forward storytelling rich in rhythm, image, atmosphere, and sensory detail.

name: Comic Registers
description: A palette of comic modes from dry wit to physical chaos and escalating farce.
